llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/MA - Solution Architect (m/f/d)
job.description: Responsibilities: Deep understanding of SAP S/4HANA end to end Supply Chain processes • Strong knowledge of SAP standard vs. custom development and the ability to make design decisions accordingly with a focus on SAP SD • Solid understanding of SAP architecture principles, including S/4HANA, BTP, integration, and extension patterns • Good technical foundation (e.g. ABAP basics, APIs, integrations), without necessarily being a developer• Experience with ERP transformations or large SAP programs Qualifications: Deep understanding of SAP S/4HANA end to end Supply Chain processes • Strong knowledge of SAP standard vs. custom development and the ability to make design decisions accordingly with a focus on SAP SD • Solid understanding of SAP architecture principles, including S/4HANA, BTP, integration, and extension patterns • Good technical foundation (e.g. ABAP basics, APIs, integrations), without necessarily being a developer• Experience with ERP transformations or large SAP programs What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. [to include specific local benefits]. Profession / Occupation / Studies: 'Completed university degree in Business IT, Business Economics, Information Science, Engineering, or Natural Science
